The repo-level `/workspace/script.oppo203.iso.external/AGENTS.md` norm says “No inline code comments by default” and “Never explain WHAT”; these comments just restate the assertions below rather than documenting a non-obvious invariant. In this repository context they should be removed or converted into clearer assertion names/structure so the new test stays aligned with the documented style rule.
